scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @lutron/api" "npm run dev -w @lutron/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @lutron/shared && npm run build -w @lutron/api && npm run build -w @lutron/web
scripts.db:seed: npm run build -w @lutron/shared && npm run db:seed -w @lutron/api
